prompt:
Create a luxury maximalist vector magazine cover in portrait format
Theme: Queen of the Lunar Cosmos

A celestial moon queen sits upon a floating crescent throne surrounded by glowing constellations, sacred deer, ethereal birds, floating temples, cosmic flowers, radiant relics, starlit skies, and dreamlike heavenly landscapes. The scene blends mythology, fantasy, and high fashion editorial design into a breathtaking celestial kingdom.

Style
Ultra-detailed vector illustration
Luxury editorial magazine aesthetic
Rich layered composition
Ornamental celestial elements
Sophisticated fashion-cover design
Premium artistic quality

Color Palette
Pearl ivory, lunar silver, soft lavender, midnight sapphire, champagne gold.

Typography
Main Headline: "QUEEN OF THE LUNAR COSMOS"
Secondary Headline: "Exploring the Infinite Kingdom Beyond the Stars"
Issue Number: "#018"

Design Elements
Elegant borders, editorial information panels, numbering systems, celestial diagrams, premium graphics, halftone textures, metallic print effects, and refined magazine layouts.

Requirements
English typography only, professionally typeset, perfectly readable, no Chinese characters, no random text, no logos, no watermarks.
